methods.name: Anonymous Group Signature Authentication for Vehicular Networks
methods.description: Group signature-based authentication method for vehicles with a focus on privacy preservation. Allows authentication to charging networks without revealing vehicle identity while proving membership in a group of vehicles and allowing revocation of individual memberships.
sources: @article{chenAnonymousAuthenticationScheme2015,  title = {An Anonymous Authentication Scheme for Plug-in Electric Vehicles Joining to Charging/Discharging Station in Vehicle-to-{{Grid}} ({{V2G}}) Networks},  author = {Chen, Jie and Zhang, Yueyu and Su, Wencong},  year = {2015},  month = mar,  journal = {China Communications},  volume = {12},  number = {3},  pages = {9--19},  issn = {1673-5447},  doi = {10.1109/CC.2015.7084359}}
